purpose_context: Low-risk sanitization slice continuing merged #2773 (charter.yaml authority inversion), which left charter.generator and charter.extractor confirmed-dead-but-deferred and retired the render-path doctrine write. Under epics #1797 (dead-code/LOC reduction) and #1914 (governed/gate ops must be no-op-stable). The residual no-op churn now lives in the preflight auto-refresh -> charter synthesize surface gated by a freshness signal in charter_runtime/freshness/computer.py; this slice reproduces it red-first (fresh clone / doctrine-tracked) and fixes it.
purpose_tldr: Delete two confirmed-dead charter modules (generator, extractor), shrink the arch dead-code baselines downward, and make the charter doctrine render + preflight/synthesize surface no-op-stable so governed reads never dirty the tree (#2373/#1914).
